fault_hypothesis: The counter clamping logic is incorrect. On line 67, when the new value exceeds the ceiling, it is set to `effective_ceiling - 1` instead of being set to `effective_ceiling`.

constraints.intent: The clamped value must be set to the ceiling exactly, not one less.
The value assigned after clamping should be exactly the ceiling.
After the clamping branch, the new value must be the ceiling.

spec.expr: not (effective_ceiling__1 is not None and new_value__1 > effective_ceiling__1) or new_value__3 == effective_ceiling__1

constraints.intent: If the value was clamped, it must be set to the ceiling.
